title: AccountManagerService getAccountsByTypeForPackage type=null bypasses ownership check
notes: getAccountsByTypeForPackage(type=null, pkg) skips ownership check because condition (type != null && !isAccountManagedByCaller) is false when type is null. Authenticator app can query accounts visible to any arbitrary package across all types. Also: getAccountsAsUserForPackage reassigns callingUid=packageUid when authenticator manages the type, allowing authenticator to view accounts from target package's perspective (ACCT-3). Session bundle in finishSession not caller-bound (ACCT-2).
